title: Colombia at the 2026 World Cup: roster, list, players, group stage schedule and results
original_text: Colombia’s 26-man squad for the 2026 World Cup in the United States, Mexico and Canada is led by James Rodríguez and Luis Díaz. The roster is packed with experience and attacking talent. Davinson Sánchez, Jhon Arias, Juan Fernando Quintero and Luis Javier Suárez were also included among the selections. The most notable additions are Willer Ditta, fresh off winning the Liga MX title with Cruz Azul, and Juan Camilo “Cucho” Hernández. Among the players left out of the final roster are Rafael Santos Borré, Carlos Cuesta and Johan Carbonero. World Cup 2026 calculator: simulate groups and matchups and generate your World Cup bracket prediction Goalkeepers (3): Camilo Vargas, Álvaro Montero, David Ospina. Defenders (8): Davinson Sánchez, Jhon Lucumí, Yerry Mina, Willer Ditta, Daniel Muñoz, Santiago Arias, Johan Mojica, Deiver Machado. Midfielders (10): Richard Ríos, Jefferson Lerma, Kevin Castaño, Juan Camilo Portilla, Gustavo Puerta, Jhon Arias, Jorge Carrascal, Juan Fernando Quintero, James Rodríguez, Jaminton Campaz. Forwards (5): Juan Camilo Hernández, Luis Díaz, Luis Javier Suárez, Carlos Gómez and Jhon Córdoba. Get closer to the game!
